data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Microsoft.com employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Microservices are deployed in Docker containers orchestrated through Kubernetes.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Utilizes Microsoft Azure for its cloud infrastructure, leveraging IaaS and PaaS solutions.
data.technical_spec: Relies on Azure Virtual Machines and App Services for deployment.

data.title: CDN Integration
data.description: Integrates with a Content Delivery Network (CDN) for faster content delivery.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure CDN for distributing content globally.

data.title: Robust API Layer
data.description: Provides a well-documented API layer for third-party integrations.
data.technical_spec: Based on RESTful services utilizing JSON for data interchange.

data.title: High-Availability Architecture
data.description: Designed for high availability to ensure continuous service.
data.technical_spec: Implements load balancing and failover mechanisms across data centers.
